issues.description: PlayFromHand is incorrect; effect says 'Play... from your trash rested', not from hand. Should be custom action or PlayFromTrash with rested=true state
Filter uses 'subType' but ODYSSEY and Straw Hat Crew are types, not subtypes. Should use 'type' with array: ["ODYSSEY", "Straw Hat Crew"]
FlipLife does not capture the 'may' optionality or the 'top or bottom' choice. Should be optional with choice parameter
Action sequence is wrong: FlipLife should be prerequisite/condition, then conditional Play action only if life was flipped. Currently structured as sequential guaranteed actions
